eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Douglas, WA; at 10:26 AM on JUL 4, 2026 Effective until 2:26 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 2 Fire Evacuation
Douglas County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 2 Fire Evacuation near Orondo.
LEVEL 2 means "BE READY TO LEAVE"

The affected area is for all residences addressed off McNeil Canyon Road, and all attached roads to the south of McNeil Canyon Road; including Coyote Curve Ln, Mountain Springs Rd, Utopia Dr, Thomas Dr, Eagles Nest Rd, Yarbrough Dr, Quartz Dr, Pine Hallow Dr, Sunflower Ln, Yellow Topaz Ln, Red Rose Ln and Amethyst Ln.

You will be kept advised as conditions change. Please monitor local radio stations/social media, the Douglas County Incident Map and the Douglas County Sheriff's Office Facebook page for updates.

Douglas County Sheriff's Facebook:

https://www.facebook.com/DouglasCountySheriffsOfficeWA/ LEVEL 2 means "BE READY TO LEAVE"
